name: codexclaw
description: cli-jaw-style dev discipline (dev skills + PABCD) and multi-model subagents for the OpenAI Codex runtime, with optional opencodex provider routing.

interface.shortDescription: cli-jaw dev discipline + multi-model subagents for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codexclaw reuses the OpenAI Codex runtime and layers cli-jaw-style development discipline (dev-* skills, PABCD workflow), multi-model subagent routing, and an optional opencodex (ocx) provider bridge. Includes a local GUI for subagent model selection and prompt tuning.
defaultPrompt: Plan this with codexclaw PABCD and use multi-model subagents.
Run cxc map to get the shape of this repo before we dive in.
Interview me first, then draft a diff-level plan.
